creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
I try to install flash but it's just fail for some reason:

# pipelight-plugin --create-mozilla-plugins
$ pipelight-plugin --enable flash

"Something went wrong, check the terminal output"

Also I can't update script.

 pipelight-plugin --update
--2014-12-12 05:08:51--  https://bitbucket.org/mmueller2012/pipelight/raw/master/share/install-dependency.sig
Resolving bitbucket.org (bitbucket.org)... 131.103.20.167, 131.103.20.168
Connecting to bitbucket.org (bitbucket.org)|131.103.20.167|:443... connected.
ERROR: cannot verify bitbucket.org's certificate, issued by ‘/C=US/O=DigiCert Inc/OU=www.digicert.com/CN=DigiCert High Assurance EV CA-1’:
  Unable to locally verify the issuer's authority.
To connect to bitbucket.org insecurely, use `--no-check-certificate'.

ERROR: Failed to download latest dependency-installer script
